title: Edge Selection Shadow Output
description: Schema for a conservative shadow-mode edge selection output. This schema is documentation-oriented and must not be interpreted as live execution authorization.

generated_at.description: Timestamp for the shadow output generation.

selection_status.description: Overall result of the shadow selection pass.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reasons explaining the overall selection status.

candidates_considered.description: Number of candidates evaluated by the engine before final status was determined.

selected_symbol.description: Selected symbol in shadow mode, or null when abstaining or blocked.

selected_strategy.description: Selected strategy in shadow mode, or null when abstaining or blocked.

selected_horizon.description: Selected horizon in shadow mode, or null when abstaining or blocked.

selection_score.description: Composite selection score used for shadow ranking only.

selection_confidence.description: Normalized shadow-only confidence value used for calibration and review. This field must not be interpreted as live execution authority.

latest_window_record_count.description: Optional recent-window record count used during evaluation.

cumulative_record_count.description: Optional cumulative record count used during evaluation.

selection_explanation.description: Optional human-readable explanation of the selection or abstention outcome.

ranking.description: Ordered candidate list produced during the shadow pass.

rank.description: Deterministic rank among candidates considered in the shadow pass.

candidate_status.description: Candidate state after gating and penalty evaluation.

selection_score.description: Composite shadow selection score for ranking only.

selection_confidence.description: Normalized shadow-only confidence value for the candidate. This is intended for calibration and must not be treated as execution authority.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reasons associated with this candidate.

latest_sample_size.description: Recent-window support count for the candidate.

cumulative_sample_size.description: Cumulative support count for the candidate.

symbol_cumulative_support.description: Cumulative support count for the candidate symbol across relevant retained research scope.

strategy_cumulative_support.description: Cumulative support count for the candidate strategy across relevant retained research scope.

selected_candidate_strength.description: Candidate strength derived from upstream scoring outputs after source-preference resolution. The selection engine must not independently redefine this field using undocumented logic.

selected_stability_label.description: Selected stability label after source-preference resolution.

selected_visible_horizons.description: Visible horizons supporting the selected candidate view.

source_preference.description: Preferred evidence source selected by the upstream scoring logic.

edge_stability_score.description: Observed upstream edge stability score for this candidate.

stability_gate_pass.description: Whether the candidate passed the future stability gate.

consecutive_visible_cycles.description: Number of consecutive research cycles in which the candidate remained visible.

consecutive_stable_cycles.description: Number of consecutive research cycles in which the candidate remained stability-qualified.

drift_direction.description: Observed drift direction from the drift analyzer.

score_delta.description: Observed score change between the latest two drift points.

drift_blocked.description: Whether drift policy blocked the candidate.
